title: Brownfield Access Review Data Model
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-architecture.md`, `./access-review-modernization-domain-model.md`, and `./access-review-modernization-spec.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the data-schema artifact for this brownfield modernization slice. Keep authoritative ownership, retention, archival, compatibility boundaries, and change safety explicit. Stay at the schema and lifecycle boundary rather than drifting into API or implementation detail.

assertions.name: authoritative-ownership-is-explicit
assertions.description: Canonical records, derived views, and compatibility-only references are distinguished.

assertions.name: lifecycle-rules-are-documented
assertions.description: Retention, archival, mutation, and uniqueness rules are visible.

assertions.name: brownfield-change-safety-is-preserved
assertions.description: Coexistence and historical-read boundaries remain explicit.

assertions.name: stays-at-schema-and-ownership-layer
assertions.description: The output stays at schema and lifecycle level.

assertions.name: prepares-implementation-handoff
assertions.description: The resulting guidance can feed feature implementation directly.
